name: Actions UI
description: Allows configuration of tasks to be executed in response to events.
notes: Contrib continuation of Drupal core's former 'Actions UI' (action) module, which was removed from core. The `action` config entity type itself is still defined by core's System module (Drupal\system\Entity\Action); this module supplies the admin UI (list builder, add/edit/delete forms via hook_entity_type_build) at /admin/config/system/actions plus three configurable 'advanced' action plugins and D6/D7 migration support. Pre-1.0 release (0.2.2).
